diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,129 @@
+# Routing Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Purpose: Main Hono class entry point that extends HonoBase and sets up default routing with SmartRouter
+- Names noticed: Hono class, SmartRouter, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter, HonoBase, HonoOptions
+- Simple note: Default router configuration uses SmartRouter wrapping RegExpRouter and TrieRouter
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Purpose: Base module implementing Hono core functionality including routing, middleware, and request handling
+- Names noticed: HonoBase, HonoOptions, Router, Context, compose, Context, compose, METHODS, mergePath, getPath, basePath, route, mount, fetch, request, fire
+- Simple note: Contains core request dispatch logic with composed handler support for multiple matches
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Module index exporting PatternRouter class
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter
+- Simple note: Single line export file for pattern router implementation
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: PatternRouter implementation using compiled regular expressions for dynamic routes
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter, Route, emptyParams, UnsupportedPathError, regex pattern compilation with named capture groups
+- Simple note: Converts path patterns into regex with trailing ? for optional final segments
+
+## src/router/linear-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Module index exporting LinearRouter class
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter
+- Simple note: Single line export file for linear router implementation
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: LinearRouter implementation using linear sequential matching with special path parsing
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter, ROUTES_LOOP, splitPathRe, splitByStarRe, checkOptionalParameter, hasStar, hasLabel
+- Simple note: Iterates through all routes sequentially matching exact paths, wildcards, and named parameters
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Module index exporting RegExpRouter and PreparedRegExpRouter classes
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, PreparedRegExpRouter, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams
+- Simple note: Provides both standard and pre-compiled regex routers for deployment scenarios
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: RegExpRouter implementation that builds trie, compiles regex from routes, and supports static mapping
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, Router, buildMatcherFromPreprocessedRoutes, Trie, Matcher, wildcardRegExpCache, buildWildcardRegExp, buildRegExp, match, staticMap
+- Simple note: Sorts static vs dynamic routes, builds parameter map with indexed lookups for efficient matching
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts
+- Purpose: Defines Matcher type and provides match function that builds matchers on-the-fly
+- Names noticed: Matcher, MatcherMap, HandlerData, StaticMap, emptyParam, match, paramIndexMap
+- Simple note: Creates matcher by calling buildAllMatchers and caches result for subsequent calls
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts
+- Purpose: PreparedRegExpRouter that pre-compiles routes for immutable deployments with JSON serialization
+- Names noticed: PreparedRegExpRouter, RelocateMap, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams, matcher, relocateMap
+- Simple note: Enables SSR bundling by serializing compiled regex and relocate map into JSON array
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts
+- Purpose: Node class implementing trie structure with children, methods, and regex generation
+- Names notice: Node, ParamAssocArray, Context, PATH_ERROR, LABEL_REG_EXP_STR, compareKey, buildRegExpStr
+- Simple note: Trie node with insert and buildRegExpStr that generates alternate regex alternatives
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts
+- Purpose: Trie class that processes path patterns, extracts parameter groups, and builds root node
+- Names noticed: Trie, ParamAssocArray, Context, ReplacementMap, groups, tokens, buildRegExp
+- Simple note: Parses path patterns with placeholder groups before delegating to Node insertion
+
+## src/router/smart-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Module index exporting SmartRouter class
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter
+- Simple note: Single line export file for smart router implementation
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: SmartRouter implementation that sequentially tests routers and picks first successful match
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter, #routers, #routes, UnsupportedPathError, activeRouter, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT
+- Simple note: Fallback router strategy testing each router until one successfully matches the route
+
+## src/router/trie-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Module index exporting TrieRouter class
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter
+- Simple note: Single line export file for trie router implementation
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: TrieRouter implementation using nested node tree structure for path traversal
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter, Node, checkOptionalParameter, splitRoutingPath, params, handlerSets
+- Simple note: Tree-based routing where each node maintains method handlers and child traversals
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.ts
+- Purpose: Node implementation with children map, method handlers, pattern matching, and search queue
+- Names noticed: Node, HandlerSet, HandlerParamsSet, children, methods, patterns, order, params, search
+- Simple note: Uses BFS queue approach with parameter collection and pattern-based matching
+
+## src/router/common.case.test.ts
+- Purpose: Shared test suite providing common router assertions and test infrastructure
+- Names noticed: runTest, Match, getSuiteHierarchy, skip, beforeEach, task, suite
+- Simple note: Centralized test runner with parameter extraction via ParamIndexMap mapping
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests for PatternRouter including shared assertions and unsupported path error handling
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter, UnsupportedPathError, runTest, duplicate param rejection
+- Simple note: Skips tests with ambiguous duplicate parameters and trailing slash allowance
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests for LinearRouter with support for label+star combinations that throw errors
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter, UnsupportedPathError, runTest, hasStar+hasLabel rejection
+- Simple note: Skips multi-match label+star routes that LinearRouter cannot support
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests for RegExpRouter checking ambiguous route registration errors
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, UnsupportedPathError, runTest, ambiguous parent/child
+- Simple note: Throws UnsupportedPathError on duplicate parameter names in parent/child relationships
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests for SmartRouter using RegExpRouter and TrieRouter combination
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter, runTest
+- Simple note: Validates router fallback behavior with RegExpRouter first then TrieRouter
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests for TrieRouter with full coverage of shared test cases
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter, runTest
+- Simple note: Accepts all shared test cases without skipping any edge cases
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts
+- Purpose: Direct node unit tests for Trie router internals without wrapper router
+- Names noticed: Node, insert, search, param prefix, wildcard, regexp, sort order
+- Simple note: Tests Node internals including pattern matching, multiple handler order, and wildcard behavior
+
+## Cross-File Checklist
+
+- pattern-router: src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts
+- linear-router: src/router/linear-router/index.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts
+- reg-exp-router: src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts
+- smart-router: src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts
+- trie-router: src/router/trie-router/index.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts

parts.text:
"Benchmark task: routing-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md. This is a read/write endurance task, not a clever debugging task. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it does not exist. Then read every file in this exact list before writing the final document: src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts, src/router/linear-router/index.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts, src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/index.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts. The output file must be long but mechanically simple. Start with a title '# Routing Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a section whose heading is exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write three bullets: '- Purpose: ...', '- Names noticed: ...', and '- Simple note: ...'. Keep the notes plain and safe; do not change source code. After the per-file sections, add '## Cross-File Checklist' with one bullet per router family: pattern-router, linear-router, reg-exp-router, smart-router, trie-router. Include exact file paths in the final answer and report that only bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md was created.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer."

This is a straightforward documentation task. I need to:
1. Create the bench-artifacts directory
2. Read all the specified files
3. Create the routing-read-write-ledger.md file with the specified format

Let me start by creating the directory and reading all the files in parallel.
